experiences.title: Scuba Diving
experiences.description: Explore vibrant coral gardens with expert guides in crystal-clear Maldivian waters.

experiences.title: Watersports
experiences.description: From jet skiing to kayaking and paddleboarding, enjoy a full range of thrilling water activities in the warm Indian Ocean.

experiences.title: Fishing
experiences.description: Join our crew for traditional Maldivian fishing excursions — from sunset handline fishing to exciting big-game deep-sea adventures.

experiences.title: Manta, Dolphin & Whaleshark Cruise
experiences.description: Sail alongside the ocean's most magnificent creatures — mantas, spinner dolphins and whale sharks — in the Maldives' protected marine zones.

experiences.title: Sand Bank Trip
experiences.description: Step ashore on a pristine uninhabited sandbank — a stretch of pure white sand surrounded by nothing but turquoise ocean and open sky.

experiences.title: Snorkeling Trip
experiences.description: Glide through warm, crystal-clear waters above vibrant coral reefs teeming with tropical fish and Maldivian marine life.

experiences.title: Water Golf
experiences.description: Tee off in the heart of the Indian Ocean with Eco Water Golf — launching floating balls into the endless blue from the deck of Azalea. A playful, one-of-a-kind activity perfect for relaxed afternoons or lighthearted group competitions on your Maldives yacht charter.

experiences.title: Resort Day Trip
experiences.description: Step off Azalea and spend the day at one of the Maldives' most iconic 5-star resorts — enjoying fine dining, spa treatments and world-class facilities. A perfect blend of private yacht freedom and resort indulgence.
